quests.title: Run your first proof
quests.promise: Produce a real, governed Infrix proof in one step — no setup, no node trust.

missions.title: Run a governed escrow proof
missions.promise: Run the golden escrow flow locally and export a portable proof.
missions.detail: independently verified without trusting the node

quests.title: Verify it without trusting the node
quests.promise: Re-check your proof offline and see it hold without trusting the node that made it.

missions.title: Independently verify offline
missions.promise: Verify the proof with the canonical verifier, no node, no network.

quests.title: Watch it in Cinema
quests.promise: Replay the exact execution that produced your proof — and see the replay independently match.

missions.title: Reproduce the run via replay capsule
missions.promise: Replay the bundle's deterministic capsule and confirm it matches the outcome.

quests.title: Ask the workbench to build a plan
quests.promise: Describe an outcome in plain language and get a grounded, inspectable plan.

missions.title: Turn intent into a grounded plan
missions.promise: Ask the Intent Copilot for a plan and inspect what it grounded to.
missions.detail: the workbench grounded your intent to a real capability (infrix/regulated-escrow) and produced a hash-bound plan

quests.title: Approve a safe local action
quests.promise: See the approval gate: a plan, a plan-hash-bound approval, then a real, verified run.

missions.title: Approve, then run a safe local plan
missions.promise: Plan a safe local action, mint a plan-hash-bound approval, and run it.

quests.title: Review a proof in the inbox
quests.promise: Receive a proof, re-verify it independently, and sign an artifact-bound approval.

missions.title: Receive, verify, and approve
missions.promise: Send your proof to the inbox, verify it, and approve it with a signed decision.

quests.title: Explain a signature to an auditor
quests.promise: See exactly what a signature would do, in plain language, before anyone signs.

missions.title: Get a plain-language signature explanation
missions.promise: Ask the identity center to explain a sample signing request in plain language.
missions.detail: you saw, in plain language, exactly what the signature would do before signing

quests.title: Verify like an embedded widget
quests.promise: Verify a proof the way an in-browser widget would — offline, with no node trust.

missions.title: Run the embeddable offline verification
missions.promise: Verify the proof offline as the widget kit does, and read its honest verdict.

quests.title: Seal a local evidence manifest
quests.promise: Build a tamper-evident manifest over your proof — the local seed of a release evidence package.

missions.title: Compute and verify a SHA-256 evidence manifest
missions.promise: Seal your proof artifacts under a SHA-256 manifest and re-verify it.

quests.title: Upgrade to a live L0-anchored proof
quests.promise: Take your proof from L3 (local) to L4 by anchoring it on the Kermit testnet — earned only when live L0 confirms.

missions.title: Anchor on Kermit and confirm L4
missions.promise: Run the flow against Kermit so a real L0 anchor is confirmed, reaching L4.

catalog.title: Run your first proof
catalog.promise: Produce a real, governed Infrix proof in one step — no setup, no node trust.

missions.title: Run a governed escrow proof
missions.promise: Run the golden escrow flow locally and export a portable proof.
missions.requires: the exported proof verifies cryptographically (L3 locally; never L4 without live L0)

catalog.title: Verify it without trusting the node
catalog.promise: Re-check your proof offline and see it hold without trusting the node that made it.

missions.title: Independently verify offline
missions.promise: Verify the proof with the canonical verifier, no node, no network.
missions.requires: the verifier accepts the proof AND reports the node was not trusted

catalog.title: Watch it in Cinema
catalog.promise: Replay the exact execution that produced your proof — and see the replay independently match.

missions.title: Reproduce the run via replay capsule
missions.promise: Replay the bundle's deterministic capsule and confirm it matches the outcome.
missions.requires: the deterministic replay reproduces the recorded outcome

catalog.title: Ask the workbench to build a plan
catalog.promise: Describe an outcome in plain language and get a grounded, inspectable plan.

missions.title: Turn intent into a grounded plan
missions.promise: Ask the Intent Copilot for a plan and inspect what it grounded to.
missions.requires: the plan is grounded in a real capability and hash-bound (a local learning artifact, not a proof)

catalog.title: Approve a safe local action
catalog.promise: See the approval gate: a plan, a plan-hash-bound approval, then a real, verified run.

missions.title: Approve, then run a safe local plan
missions.promise: Plan a safe local action, mint a plan-hash-bound approval, and run it.
missions.requires: a valid plan-hash-bound approval AND the gated run verifies

catalog.title: Review a proof in the inbox
catalog.promise: Receive a proof, re-verify it independently, and sign an artifact-bound approval.

missions.title: Receive, verify, and approve
missions.promise: Send your proof to the inbox, verify it, and approve it with a signed decision.
missions.requires: the inbox re-verifies the proof AND records a valid signed, artifact-bound approval

catalog.title: Explain a signature to an auditor
catalog.promise: See exactly what a signature would do, in plain language, before anyone signs.

missions.title: Get a plain-language signature explanation
missions.promise: Ask the identity center to explain a sample signing request in plain language.
missions.requires: a fail-closed, plain-language explanation is produced (a local learning artifact)

catalog.title: Verify like an embedded widget
catalog.promise: Verify a proof the way an in-browser widget would — offline, with no node trust.

missions.title: Run the embeddable offline verification
missions.promise: Verify the proof offline as the widget kit does, and read its honest verdict.
missions.requires: the offline verification accepts the proof and never claims live L0 it did not check

catalog.title: Seal a local evidence manifest
catalog.promise: Build a tamper-evident manifest over your proof — the local seed of a release evidence package.

missions.title: Compute and verify a SHA-256 evidence manifest
missions.promise: Seal your proof artifacts under a SHA-256 manifest and re-verify it.
missions.requires: the manifest recomputes exactly (local integrity; full release evidence adds signing + live L0 on Kermit)

catalog.title: Upgrade to a live L0-anchored proof
catalog.promise: Take your proof from L3 (local) to L4 by anchoring it on the Kermit testnet — earned only when live L0 confirms.

missions.title: Anchor on Kermit and confirm L4
missions.promise: Run the flow against Kermit so a real L0 anchor is confirmed, reaching L4.
missions.requires: L4 is recorded ONLY when the verifier confirms a live L0 anchor (Kermit); local mode stays an honest L3 learning step

receipt.title: Run a governed escrow proof
receipt.detail: independently verified without trusting the node
